events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: field condition for shaft alignment compared with referenced drawing or manufacturer sheet. Tags, ratings, layout callouts line up with installed work, revision block current. Reference material on hand: API 686, laser system manuals. Work stage tested/inspected. Need evaluate. It seems compliant, pass. Need fill fields. decision pass. risk low. work_stage tested/inspected. component_conditions empty list. percent_complete maybe 95? value 0. sound_source empty? The schema says sound source when asked; not audio task. Could use "" or omit? Required output shape includes all keys. Use empty string. confidence 0.95. event_time 0.0. rate 0.0. order empty list. workable empty list. findings empty list. actions empty list. rationale brief. references API 686, laser system manuals. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision": "pass", "risk": "low", "work_stage": "tested/inspected", "component_conditions": [], "percent_complete": 95, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0.0, "rate": 0.0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": [], "actions": [], "rationale": "Installed shaft alignment matches the current drawing/manufacturer sheet, tags, ratings, layout callouts, and revision are correct, and reference standards are available; no defects or non-compliance observed.", "references": ["API 686", "laser system manuals"]}
